creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kevin Zheng from comment #4)
Yes, I did read them and the -A option adds all checks which tend to trigger false positives, I just copy and pasted the output. The first item was recently added to portlint, it does seem to be a false positive and at first glance my guess is due to no other USE_x entries. I was only concerned about USE_LDCONFIG and license, sorry that I didn't make this clear.
